text: The fluorescent coolness and sharp lines of this place invoke in me a sense of anticipation and curiosity, as if I am on the threshold between the abstract and the practical. The external world—glass, metal, electric blue—signals a space devoted to innovation or display, yet the surreal lighting and oblique angles make me feel slightly estranged. Entering further, I am confronted by text and imagery, concepts of research and development encircling me like a web. I am aware of the effort and intellect concentrated here, but also of my own state: a philosophical observer, neither fully belonging nor absent, present in a pause between understanding and wonder.
